title: FOIA Request Processing Workflow
description: Processes Freedom of Information Act requests from submission through determination, including exemption review and appeal.

actors.description: Member of the public or organization submitting a FOIA request for government records.
Clerk who reviews FOIA requests for completeness and assigns them to a FOIA officer.
FOIA officer responsible for searching records, reviewing exemptions, and preparing determinations.
Independent review panel that adjudicates FOIA appeals. Must be independent of the original determination.
Government records management system used for searching responsive records.

submitted.description: Requester has submitted a FOIA request. Awaiting intake review.

onEntry.x-durationNote: Calendar-day fallback for `P20BD` (20 business days) until the businessCalendar sidecar binding lands and the runtime can honor business-day semantics; see TODO §4.1 / business-calendar work.

transitions.description: Intake clerk confirms request is complete and assigns to FOIA officer.
Request is missing required information; requester must be notified.

deficiency-notice.description: Requester notified of deficiencies; awaiting corrected submission.

transitions.description: Requester has corrected and resubmitted the request.

intake-review.description: FOIA officer assigned; searching for responsive records.

transitions.description: Responsive records found; proceeding to exemption review.

exemption-review.description: FOIA officer reviews responsive records for applicable exemptions (national security, personal privacy, law enforcement).

transitions.description: All responsive records are releasable; full disclosure.
Some records withheld under exemptions; partial disclosure adverse decision.
All records withheld under exemptions; full denial adverse decision.

adverse-decision-preparation.description: FOIA officer prepares adverse decision notice with itemized exemption citations and appeal instructions.

transitions.description: Adverse decision notice prepared and ready for issuance.

adverse-decision-issued.description: Adverse decision notice sent to requester. Appeal window open.

transitions.description: Requester has filed an administrative appeal within the appeal window.
Appeal window elapsed with no appeal filed. Decision is final.

appeal-review.description: Independent review panel adjudicates the appeal. Must be independent of original determination.

transitions.description: Appeal panel grants the appeal; records will be disclosed.
Appeal panel denies the appeal; original determination stands.
Appeal panel partially grants the appeal.

no-records-determination.description: Determination that no responsive records exist; requester notified.

transitions.description: No-records notice sent; appeal window opens.

full-disclosure-response.description: All responsive records released to requester.

transitions.description: Records transmitted to requester; case closed.

appeal-granted-response.description: Appeal granted; records released pursuant to appeal determination.

transitions.description: Records transmitted per appeal determination; case closed.

appeal-denied-final.description: Appeal denied. Requester may seek judicial review. Workflow complete.

closed-withdrawn.description: Request withdrawn by requester. Workflow closed.

requestAssigned.description: FOIA officer has been assigned to the request.

determinationMade.description: A determination has been made on the FOIA request.

adverseDecisionIssued.description: An adverse decision notice has been issued to the requester.

appealFiled.description: Requester has filed an administrative appeal.

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the FOIA request.

requesterName.description: Full name of the FOIA requester.

requesterContact.description: Contact information for the requester (email or mailing address).

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the FOIA request was submitted.

assignedOfficer.description: Identifier of the FOIA officer assigned to this request.

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when the request was assigned to an officer.

recordsSearchCompletedAt.description: Timestamp when the records search was completed.

exemptionsApplied.description: List of FOIA exemption codes applied during review (e.g., b1 national security, b6 personal privacy, b7 law enforcement).

determinationOutcome.description: Outcome of the FOIA determination: full-disclosure, partial-withholding, full-withholding, or no-records.

withholdingJustification.description: Itemized explanation of withholding decisions with exemption citations.

adverseDecisionIssuedAt.description: Timestamp when the adverse decision notice was issued.

appealFiledAt.description: Timestamp when the requester filed an administrative appeal.

appealOutcome.description: Outcome of the administrative appeal: granted, partially-granted, or denied.

execution.x-defaultTaskTimeoutNote: Calendar-day fallback for `P20BD` (20 business days); business-day semantics TBD when the businessCalendar sidecar binding lands.
